education.degree: In Progress - Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering

projects.title: Baja SAE Lower A-Arm
projects.subtitle: Purdue Baja SAE Suspension Component
projects.summary: Researched, designed, and parametrically modeled lower a-arms for a shock-to-upper suspension system
details: Modeled assembly components in Solidworks for manufacturability and ground clearance while minimizing weight.

projects.title: Formula SAE Welded Front Rockers
projects.subtitle: Purdue Formula SAE Suspension Component
projects.summary: Designed welded front suspension rockers achieving ~18.8% weight reduction while maintaining a 1.6 Factor of Safety.
details: Modeled assembly components in Siemens NX and performed FEA simulations in ANSYS Mechanical to locate stress concentrations.

projects.title: Automotive Electronics & Speedometer Retrofit
projects.subtitle: Custom Harnessing & Dashboard Integration
projects.summary: Custom automotive head unit, backup camera, and aftermarket dash cluster integrations.
details: Soldered custom wiring harnesses to integrate upgraded radios with factory wiring seamlessly.
Wired aftermarket interfaces for backup cameras and steering wheel control retention systems.
Retrofitted a modern digital speedometer cluster to preserve vehicle driver info displays post-radio replacement.

projects.title: GD&T 3D-Printed Instructional Models
projects.subtitle: General Tool Company Onboarding Project
projects.summary: Engineered custom physical models demonstrating True Position and MMC principles for intern training.
details: Designed physical hands-on models in CAD to demonstrate complex geometric dimensioning concepts.
3D printed interactive inspection fixtures used during onboarding for future engineering interns.
Assisted interns and new hires in visualizing tolerance zones during drawing analysis.

engineering_experience.title: Baja SAE Suspension Team Member
points: Modeled assembly components in Solidworks for manufacturability and ground clearance while minimizing weight.
Iterated initial suspension-to-lower structure using FEA to find weaknesses.
Contributed in discussion about major infrastructure of car structure.

engineering_experience.title: Formula SAE Suspension Team Member
points: Modeled parts in Siemens NX and simulated in ANSYS Mechanical to find stress concentrations and safety factor.
Designed welded front rockers, which led to ~18.8% weight reduction while maintaining a 1.6 FoS.
Generated CAM toolpaths and technical drawings using GD&T to streamline the CNC process.
Supported the manufacturing of multi-operation wheel hubs using 3-axis CNC milling, hand-tapping, and custom soft-jaw fixtures.

engineering_experience.title: Installing Car Radios and Backup Cameras
points: Soldered new custom wiring harnesses to cleanly install new upgraded radios.
Wired new radios to interfaces such as backup cameras and steering wheel control retention systems.
Retrofit a modern speedometer to relocate driver information functionality from radio after radio replacement.

employment.title: Manufacturing Engineering Intern
points: Completed a cross-functional rotation across machining and fabrication departments for high-precision defense components.
Analyzed technical drawings and sales orders to generate quotes for complex assemblies.
Engineered custom 3D-printed instructional models to demonstrate GD&T principles.

employment.title: Intern / Assistant
points: Engineered a functional Python prototype to assist in tenant package tracking, aiming to modernize package management for ~50 packages at a time.
Implemented feedback from users on usability and implementation.
Gained insights into the importance of user-centered design and clear communication when working with stakeholders.
